mapper.select: select orderid, jobid, version, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, status, DATE_FORMAT(exestart,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as exestart from cotdl.tbl_piiorderthread where orderid= #{orderid} and jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by orderid, jobid, version, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3
mapper.insert: insert ignore into cotdl.tbl_piiorderthread (orderid, jobid, version, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, status, exestart) values (#{orderid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1}, #{seq2}, #{seq3}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW())
mapper.delete: delete t1 from cotdl.tbl_piiorderthread t1, cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable t2 where t2.orderid = t1.orderid and t2.jobid = t1.jobid and t2.version = t1.version and t2.stepid = t1.stepid and t2.seq1 = t1.seq1 and t2.seq2 = t1.seq2 and t2.seq3 = t1.seq3 and t2.status = 'Ended OK'
